articles.title: Senate Confirms: COVID Vaccines Linked to Cancer — Whistleblowers Silenced for Years
articles.summary: Multiple oncologists testified before U.S. Senate that stable cancer patients suffered aggressive relapses after COVID booster shots. Researchers who tried to publish these findings faced coordinated attacks on their reputations and careers.

articles.title: Prestigious Journal Caught Burying Pfizer's Flu Vaccine Failures in Elderly
articles.summary: Major medical journal deliberately omitted critical data showing Pfizer's flu vaccine failed to protect seniors. Another example of academic publishing serving pharma interests over scientific integrity.

articles.title: Medical Authoritarians Declared War on Health Freedom — Time to Fight Back
articles.summary: Constitutional attorney Jonathan Emord exposes how FDA and federal agencies systematically destroy alternative health options. Government-pharma alliance weaponizes regulatory power against decentralized healthcare choices.

articles.title: Moffitt Cancer Executive Forced Out After Internal Probe — What Were They Hiding?
articles.summary: Major cancer research institution executive steps down following undisclosed investigation. NSF watchdog unit sits empty as research misconduct goes unchecked across medical establishment.

articles.title: Vaccine Industry Operates Outside Economic Reality — No Market Accountability
articles.summary: Jeffrey Tucker exposes how government-protected vaccine monopoly destroys normal market feedback mechanisms. Industry profits from mandates while avoiding liability for failures and injuries.

articles.title: Robert Malone: Medical Establishment Destroyed Bioethics and Patient Choice
articles.summary: mRNA vaccine inventor Robert Malone documents how medical authorities abandoned informed consent principles. Bioethical frameworks corrupted to serve institutional power over individual autonomy.

articles.title: COVID Policy Damage Finally Documented — The Carnage Was Predictable
articles.summary: Comprehensive analysis reveals devastating health, economic, and social destruction from lockdowns and mandates. Public health officials ignored obvious harms while silencing dissenting scientists.

articles.title: Microplastics Linked to Chronic Disease — Industry Knew, Regulators Ignored

articles.summary: Multiple oncologists testified that stable cancer patients experienced aggressive relapses after COVID boosters, with researchers facing coordinated attacks on their reputations for reporting vaccine-cancer links. The evidence was systematically buried while patients suffered in silence.

articles.summary: June 2 Senate hearing will examine biological pathways linking COVID vaccines to increased cancer risks — research the pharmaceutical industry refuses to fund. Independent scientists forced to investigate without institutional support while patients pay the price.

articles.summary: Major journal deliberately omitted Pfizer's disastrous flu vaccine efficacy data in seniors, protecting pharmaceutical profits over scientific integrity. Another example of journal capture serving corporate interests instead of public health.

articles.title: Medical Authoritarians Systematically Destroy Health Freedom Through FDA Capture

articles.title: Vaccine Industry's Economic Model Eliminates Real Market Forces and Patient Choice
articles.summary: Jeffrey Tucker exposes how government subsidies and liability shields have created a vaccine industry immune to market discipline. Without price signals or consumer choice, the industry optimizes for profit over efficacy or safety.

articles.title: COVID Policy Architects Refuse to Account for Documented Catastrophic Damage
articles.summary: Ian Miller documents the shocking collateral damage from lockdowns, school closures, and mandates that public health officials continue to ignore. The data shows devastating harm to children and society that authorities still won't acknowledge.

articles.title: Medicaid Fraud Whistleblower Exposes Ohio's Political Cowardice Against Healthcare Corruption
articles.summary: Daily Signal analyst Mehek Cooke testified that Ohio lacks political will to confront massive Medicaid fraud schemes. State officials protect fraudulent operators while taxpayers fund a system designed to enrich connected insiders.

articles.title: Journal Hijacking Epidemic: Retraction Watch Exposes Academic Publishing's Criminal Takeover
articles.summary: The Hijacked Journal Checker now lists over 450 compromised publications while academic oversight remains toothless. Predatory publishers exploit the peer review system while NSF's watchdog unit sits empty, leaving science defenseless against fraud.
